message:
feat(engine): add 248 enrichment integration tests across 5 modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- hybrid_lane_router (44 tests): serde, conformal validity, CUSUM,
  risk budgets, EXP3 adaptive weights, reward computation, router lifecycle
- gc (63 tests): heap allocation/collection, deterministic GC,
  reference graphs, pressure, coordinator, error paths
- hash_tiers (43 tests): three-tier hash determinism, avalanche quality,
  constant_time_eq, cross-tier isolation, Display/hex formatting
- evidence_emission (44 tests): action categories, entry IDs,
  emitter config, error display, chain integrity
- idempotency_key (54 tests): key derivation determinism, epoch binding,
  dedup store operations, prune/eviction, error paths

Also fix pre-existing compile error in module_resolver_integration.rs
(CompatibilityMode import path corrected).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
